Items.Title: Switzerland beat Canada but both through to last 32
Items.Description: Switzerland seal their place in the first knockout round of the World Cup by beating co-hosts Canada to top Group B.

Items.Title: David scores with first touch for Canada
Items.Description: Canada forward Promise David scores with his first touch to give his side hope in their Group B match against Switzerland in Vancouver.

Items.Title: World Cup star handed five-match ban and shows true colours after FIFA suspension
Items.Description: Assim Madibo was shown a straight red card for the tackle that broke the leg of Canada's Ismael Kone at the World Cup.
Items.Author: Charlie Malam,James Robson
